title: Movie Swords
description: Replaces Swords with 3D Models of the Swords from A Minecraft Movie
body:
This Texture Pack Replaces All Swords with Swords that look more similar to the ones featured in A Minecraft Movie!
[Diamond Sword Third Person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8a41f9a7ddc32477cd755b8b443e333346f3b02.png)![All Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bc230da2a3fd9c8eec34175d0b4e5e0509cbd4e.png)
